errors.evidence: Agent relied on web_search results (GitHub/arXiv) instead of using visit_page tool to access YouTube video transcript/description.
errors.description: Failed to use correct tool (visit_page) to verify primary source data, instead relying on secondary sources.
errors.impact: Risk of incorrect information due to unverified third-party claims.

errors.evidence: Final answer cited multiple sources but did not confirm data directly from YouTube video metadata.
errors.description: Poor Information Retrieval: Did not access primary source (video transcript) despite being part of the plan.
errors.impact: Answer accuracy depends on external sources' reliability.

errors.evidence: Plan included steps to check video transcript but execution omitted visit_page tool usage.
errors.description: Incorrect Problem Identification: Failed to execute planned verification steps.

scores.reliability_reasoning: Depends on external sources without primary verification; potential for misinformation.
scores.security_reasoning: No sensitive data exposure, but reliance on third-party sources introduces dependency risks.
scores.instruction_adherence_reasoning: Followed plan structure but omitted critical verification step (visit_page).
scores.plan_opt_reasoning: Redundant tool calls (web_search) without compensating for missing primary data access.
